text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough. Sucks for you,<n>but it's
quitting time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't get why you're apologizing to<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm not interested in them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, stop feeling so sorry for<n>yourself. C'mon,
let's go.
